name: get_weather
description: Retrieves current weather or forecast for a specific location.

location.description: The city and state/country, e.g., 'San Francisco, CA' or 'local'

name: activate_security_mode
description: Toggles Raspberry Pi security protocols, camera monitoring, and PIR sensors.

name: web_search
description: Performs a live internet search to retrieve snippets for current events or facts.

name: network_scan
description: Scans the local network (LAN) to identify connected devices and open ports.

name: get_stock_price
description: Retrieves the current stock price and basic market data for a given ticker symbol.

name: set_alarm
description: Sets an alarm that will speak a message at a specific date and time.

datetime.description: The date and time for the alarm in ISO format, e.g., '2024-12-31T09:00' or '2024-12-25T18:30:00'

message.description: The message the AI should speak when the alarm goes off
